falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score drops below 30 within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score below 30 would indicate reduced volatility/momentum, contradicting the current HOLD signal and suggesting a different market phase.

falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 200-day moving average by ≥8% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant breakout above this key trendline would invalidate the pattern's similarity to a bottom formation, suggesting a new uptrend rather than a HOLD scenario.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume spikes to >2.5x the 30-day average on a confirmed bullish reversal candlestick pattern
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a volume-driven technical breakout would directly contradict the HOLD signal by indicating strong buying pressure and trend reversal.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
